chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 6234 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For hearing of CMA No.27698/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 20th December 2024 Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Asst. Attorney General. -*-*-*-*-*- Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, Advocate has effected appearance and undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceeding on the basis of impugned order dated 01.04.2024 initiated by the Respondent Department during pendency of Appeal before Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Commissioner (Appeals) to decide the pending Appeal(s) of the Petitioner(s), to which learned counsel for respondent and learned Asst. Attorney General concede. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals-I), Karachi to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas during such period the Respondent / Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
